name: FORGE Video RAG 100H Production Engine TypeScript Tool
capabilities: 100+ hour video collection indexing
transcript/OCR/keyframe evidence ingestion
hybrid retrieval with timestamp hints
query intent planner
evidence graph expansion
verifier confidence and downgrade logic
batch ingest and resumable job contracts
timeline and UI card presenters
evaluation harness
Spec-driven development artifacts for every serious FORGE run
Coverage report for modality gaps across transcript/OCR/frame/memory
Traceability gate from requirements to artifacts and verification proof
Readiness report for release decisions before FORGE says done
External FORGE skill compatible without embedding any SKILL.md files
Collection manifest with per-video evidence quality and reindex plan
Answer support audit that verifies cited evidence against question terms and modality needs
Explicit query-plan action for workspace/debug panels
Real trace records returned by video.trace instead of placeholder text
Premortem report for predictable 100+ hour Video RAG failure modes
Adaptive evidence bundle with temporal neighbors, modality risks, and suggested next action
Reindex plan that prioritizes transcript-first, OCR keyframes, vision keyframes, memory rebuild, and compaction
Memory map for clip, scene, video, and collection-level coverage gaps
Query complexity and search pass planning for simple, moderate, and complex video questions
Answer downgrading when evidence bundle support is weak or required modalities are missing
Provider status gate for yt-dlp, ffprobe, ffmpeg, transcription, OCR, vision, embeddings, answer generation, store, and vector search
Real yt-dlp downloader adapter for approved YouTube/media ingestion
Real FFmpeg/ffprobe media probe and frame extraction adapters
Real OpenAI speech-to-text transcription adapter and external Whisper CLI adapter
Real Tesseract CLI OCR adapter over extracted keyframes
Real OpenAI vision caption adapter for keyframe descriptions
Real OpenAI embeddings adapter and grounded LLM answer adapter
Safe spawn command runner with args arrays, timeouts, output limits, and no shell=true
Local vector store adapter and SQLite CLI schema adapter for production migration path
Real media ingest actions: video.ingestUrl and video.ingestFile with permission gate
Strict production gate that blocks real-media ingest when required providers are missing
E2E proof plan action for real YouTube/local MP4 validation before production claims
SQLite CLI VideoRagStore implementation selectable with FORGE_VIDEO_RAG_STORE=sqlite-cli
Real-media ingest fails if zero real evidence is extracted instead of silently indexing an empty video
Provider status now reports storage mode, strict production gate mode, blockers, and next actions
limitations: No AI tool can guarantee 100% correctness on all videos/questions
Real production mode requires external binaries/API keys to be configured and approved by FORGE policy
Default deterministic providers remain for tests and demos, but providerStatus truthfully reports scaffold/fallback state
The included SQLite adapter uses sqlite3 CLI as a clean optional migration path; high-concurrency deployments should use Postgres/pgvector/Qdrant/LanceDB adapters
JSON store remains for tests/demos; strict 100h production should use sqlite-cli locally or Postgres/pgvector server-side.
v7 prevents false readiness but still requires real 1h/10h/30h/100h benchmark runs before claiming production-proven status.
